task_objective: Enable correlations and monotonicity by default in full report
design_decisions: Removed the 1M row threshold for Spearman correlation and Monotonicity checks.
These features are now enabled by default whenever correlations/monotonicity flags are not explicitly False (i.e. in all full reports).
Users still retain the ability to explicitly disable them via correlations=False or monotonicity=False if performance becomes an issue.
results: Full reports now include Spearman correlations and monotonicity checks regardless of dataset size by default.
